questions.stem: 句型练习：根据问句用英文完整作答（小写）。问：What’s your goal?

questions.stem: 阅读课文判断正误（填 true 或 false，小写）。课文节选：water from the river. Oops, he falls into it.… 陈述：The ant falls into the river
questions.explanation: 根据第 50 页 Story time 内容判断。
